testcase.name: Dashboard (Authenticated) › should load the dashboard components
testcase.system-out:
PAGE TEXT CONTENT ON FAILURE: OVERSIGHT| LIVE MODE CONNECTED TO GOOGLE WORKSPACE QA TEST USER SIGN OUT TODAY'S BRIEF Good night, QA
Here's what happened in the last 24 hours
Updated 0m ago Refresh 43 EMAILS 8 IMPORTANT 3 URGENT 3 MEETINGS 1 INVOICES 6 NEEDS REPLY 5 FOLLOW-UPS EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
Today was dominated by investor conversations and client follow-ups. Three people requested meetings, one invoice requires your approval, and two clients are waiting for replies that are now overdue. No scheduling conflicts were detected for your upcoming week.
investor outreach product roadmap Q3 planning pricing discussions AI INSIGHTS You have not replied to Sarah Johnson in 4 days — she is a key client. Three separate conversations mention Friday as a deadline. Your inbox is 37% meeting-related today — above your typical 20%. Two investor emails arrived this morning — unusual for a Tuesday. Marcus Webb replied to your proposal — a positive signal worth following up. IMPORTANT EMAILS 6 shown All Urgent Important Meetings Finance Needs Reply S Sarah Johnson sarah@clientco.com 4h ago
Re: Product Roadmap — Follow Up
Sarah is following up on the product roadmap discussion from last week and wants to schedule a 30-minute call to align on Q3 priorities before the board meeting.
Client CRITICAL Needs Reply 97% confidence Reply and schedule a call for this week M Marcus Webb marcus@venturelab.vc 2h ago
Re: Oversight.ai — Seed Round Interest
Marcus from VentureLab has reviewed the deck and expressed strong interest in a seed investment conversation. He is available Thursday or Friday this week.
Client HIGH Needs Reply 94% confidence Book a call for Thursday or Friday J James Chen james@acme.io 5h ago
Invoice #1047 — Q2 Services
Invoice #1047 for Q2 services totalling $12,400 has been submitted by Acme. Payment is due within 15 days.
Finance HIGH 99% confidence Review and approve invoice #1047 P Priya Sharma priya@designstudio.io 8h ago
Meeting Request — Design Review
Priya wants to schedule a design review session for the new dashboard UI. She has proposed Tuesday or Wednesday next week.
Meeting NORMAL Needs Reply 91% confidence Confirm Tuesday or Wednesday slot A Alex Torres alex@beta-user.com 10h ago
Feedback: Oversight Beta Experience
Beta user Alex has submitted detailed feedback praising the AI agent pipeline but requesting a faster sync speed and a mobile interface.
Client NORMAL Needs Reply 88% confidence Log feedback and send acknowledgment N Notion team@mail.notion.so 12h ago
Your Notion workspace weekly summary
Weekly activity summary from Notion — 12 pages updated, 3 databases modified.
Notification LOW 85% confidence Review when convenient
Auto-refreshes every 15 minutes · Generated by Gemini 2.5 Flash
ACTION QUEUE 1 items need attention Live Sync
""
Draft email to investor@example.com
Hi, Just following up on our seed round discussion. Best, Oversight
Approve Reject
Everything important has been reviewed.
No scheduling conflicts detected. Inbox analyzed.

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › dashboard.spec.ts:31:7 › Dashboard (Authenticated) › should load the dashboard components
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: getByText('Follow up: Seed Round').first() Expected: visible Timeout: 5000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for getByText('Follow up: Seed Round').first()
